title: Greenpill Garden — Season One
dek: The public Garden thread gives the website a launch-safe onboarding and stewardship story.
excerpt: A public Garden story connecting chapters, stewards, tools, impact reporting, and the website revamp.
body:
Greenpill Garden is the best public bridge between the network structure and the new onboarding surface.

The public thread supports copy about stewardship, chapters, impact reporting, and Greenpill's need for a clearer website. Internal Garden Guide details should stay out of launch content until approved.

## Sources

- S042: https://hub.regencoordination.xyz/t/greenpill-garden-season-one/363
author: Greenpill Network research
